message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="steve-schoger" color="pink" summary="Referencing prior design guidance, support Luca as driver">
I already sent detailed visual design guidance for Step 9 in my previous message -- please check your inbox for it. Quick summary:

1. Third radio button "Waiting For" in the existing `.inbox-item__clarify-options` row, same styling as the other radio labels.
2. Progressive disclosure via CSS `:has()` -- show "Who or what?" input when "Waiting For" is selected, hide the context selector (contexts don't apply to waiting-for items).
3. Styling matches existing clarify field patterns (`.inbox-item__first-action-input` sizing and label styling).
4. No new design tokens needed.

I support you continuing as driver. No blocking issues from the visual design side.
</teammate-message>

content.text:
Thanks Steve, your guidance is already incorporated into the full design proposal. No blocking issues from design -- noted.

Waiting on Heydon to clarify his blocking items, then I'll start implementation.
